name: Real Sauce a La King
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the flour and seasonings.
3. Gradually stir in the milk and light cream. Add the chopped green pepper, pimientos, and mushrooms.
4. Cook the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes or until it has thickened.
5. Without stirring, cook gently for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Beat the egg yolks and sherry together.
7. Gradually add this mixture to the sauce.
